title: from_piv panics on PIV longer than 4 bytes
description:
Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/seqnum.rs:127-129
Issue: from_piv() folds arbitrary-length input into u32. For PIV > 4 bytes, high bits are silently lost due to left-shift overflow. If called with 5-byte PIV containing a value > u32::MAX, it wraps silently.
Trigger: Malformed OSCORE option with n=5 and PIV bytes exceeding u32 capacity.
Impact: Sequence number interpreted incorrectly, could bypass replay protection.
Fix: Either return Result and validate len <= 4, or saturate at u32::MAX, or assert len <= 4 since PIV_MAX_LEN=5 allows this edge case.
